title: lichen-schc test fragmentation.rs import error for FragmentReceiver
description: cargo test -p lichen-schc fails with unresolved import . The module likely renamed or removed the type (test uses it but current API has only FragmentSender). This was surfaced by codereview pass 1 after rules.rs edit. Matches 'fix EVERY one' rule. P1 correctness bug. File as codereview label.
